title: Armor To Health
description: Armor now adds health instead of defense.
body:
Armor to Health is an Experimental mod that changes armor's dynamic a little;
Instead of giving resistance to attacks, it grants more maximum health.

This mod doesn't edit the protection enchantments.

### Configurable
Some Config Options are avalible for tweaking the mod's behavior to your liking.

There is also functionality for natural health regen for both mobs and players, as well as
a tag to blacklist certain mobs from naturally healing. This is disabled by default.

### Dynamics
Outhealing things becomes harder, but the extra health also makes you less vunerable to
things like poison, suffacation and fall damage.

## Recommendations
This is best used alongside other mods that make food and healing less annoying.
Beta Style minecraft eating and the "Hearty Meals" mod go good with this.
